entity.summary: Viction decentralized exchange providing concentrated-liquidity token swaps and pools, with current on-chain liquidity and indexed trading-volume and fee data.
entity.notes: Current first-party website and official organization preserve the Rabbit Swap identity and Viction exchange implementation. Current indexed V3 volume and fee data support an active classification. No exact initial launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Rabbit Swap official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party exchange website preserves the Rabbit Swap identity and production trading surface on Viction.

evidence.title: RabbitDEX official GitHub organization
evidence.notes: Official organization publishes the Rabbit Swap protocol implementation and supporting exchange repositories.
